settings.quote: The craftsmanship is unreal — the wooden chest is now a keepsake on our mantel. Truly not just a gift.
settings.author: Aanya M.

settings.quote: We sent 200 corporate hampers and every client called to say thank you. Flawless from order to delivery.

settings.quote: Personalised, elegant and packed with love. Zariya made our gifting effortless and memorable.
settings.author: Priya & Co.

settings.order_note: This hamper is made to order. Message us and we'll personally guide you through your purchase.
settings.inside_box:
• Hand-carved wooden keepsake chest with signature Zariya House plaque
  • Intricately crafted brass elephant figurine, symbolising wisdom, strength and good fortune
  • Traditional brass diya to bring warmth and light to every celebration
  • Handcrafted Ajrakh stole, celebrating the timeless beauty of Indian textile traditions
  • Handmade artisanal chocolates for a sweet indulgence
  • Signature Zariya House bookmark featuring Indian heritage-inspired artwork
  • Curated story card sharing the inspiration behind the collection
  • Signature Zariya House scroll and keepsake details
settings.delivery_text:
At Zariya House, every piece is thoughtfully handcrafted and curated with care.
• Ready-to-ship collections are typically dispatched within 5–7 business days.
• As many of our products are handcrafted, delivery timelines may vary depending on the intricacy of the design and the availability of artisan-made components.
• Customised hampers and bulk orders may require additional time, generally ranging from 2 weeks to 1 month depending on the level of personalisation.
• Once your order is dispatched, you will receive tracking details via email or WhatsApp.
• We currently deliver across India. For international shipping enquiries, please get in touch with us.
settings.care_text:
• Handle your hand-carved chest gently and wipe it with a dry, soft cloth.
• Keep the chest and its wooden elements away from direct moisture and harsh sunlight to preserve the carving and finish.
• Polish the brass elephant and diya occasionally with a soft, dry cloth to retain their shine.
• The Ajrakh stole is best gently hand-washed in cold water or dry-cleaned to protect its natural dyes.
• Cared for thoughtfully, your Heritage Chest becomes a keepsake meant to be treasured for years.
settings.conf_sub: The assurance behind every hamper we send.
settings.conf1_text: Hand-carved chests and hand-loomed details, made by master artisans.
settings.conf2_text: Ethically sourced wood, the finest silks and gourmet treats.
settings.conf3_text: Curated around your story, your people and your occasion.
settings.notes_sub: Weddings · Housewarming · Anniversaries · Festive Gifting · Corporate Gifting · Special Celebrations
settings.notes_body:
Whether gifted for weddings, festive celebrations, anniversaries or milestones, each Zariya House keepsake is an invitation to slow down, celebrate craftsmanship, and gift with intention.

Every piece has been chosen for the story it carries — from skilled hands across India to the home of someone special. Masterfully handcrafted and soulfully curated to ensure your gift leaves a legacy far beyond the moment.
